_comment: The certified-frontier pins for THIS branch's line (platform ADR-0001).
The bump bot moves exactly one component's version+digest per PR; the
certification workflow reads this file, boots that exact pair, and — on
green merge — appends a ledger tag. A maintenance branch (release/lts-*)
carries its own frozen copy of this file and its era-appropriate fixture.
digest is the artifact content address that was (or will be) booted. Until
the components ship digest-addressed artifacts (hippo release pipeline;
aperture#16 + a Dockerfile), digest is null and the certification workflow
skips the boot as an honest no-op rather than certifying an unpublished
pair. Semver is a claim; the digest is the evidence — the gate requires it.
